name: Sherlock
description: A command-line tool and Python package to find usernames across many social networks.

auth_methods.note: Official README and project docs describe a CLI tool and Python package; they contain no public API auth methods or developer API documentation.

credential_access.note: Project documentation describes installation and usage of the CLI and package; there is no mention of API keys, signup, or developer credentials.

api_surface.note: There are no public REST/GraphQL or SDK-only developer API docs. The repository and ReadTheDocs describe a CLI and Python package only.

buildability.note: There are no public API endpoints or developer authentication flows to build an AI-agent integration against. The project is a CLI/package; one could wrap the CLI or library locally, but there is no official public API to integrate with.

queries: Sherlock project API documentation developer docs "sherlock-project" "API" "developer" site:github.com OR site:readthedocs.io OR site:docs.sherlock-project.github.io OR "sherlock" username search API "sherlock-project"
